name: Stack

unions.name: Stack
unions.comment:
A data structure that only allows adding and removing elements from the top,
following the **last in, first out** (**LIFO**) principle.

values.name: fromList
values.comment: Create a stack from a list.

values.name: isEmpty
values.comment:
isEmpty empty == True

    isEmpty (fromList []) == True

    isEmpty (fromList [ 1 ]) == False

values.name: pop
values.comment:
Remove and return the last element added to the stack.

    pop empty == Nothing

    pop (push 1 empty) == Just ( 1, empty )

    pop (push 2 (fromList [ 1 ])) == Just ( 2, fromList [ 1 ] )
values.type: Stack.Stack a -> Maybe.Maybe ( a, Stack.Stack a )

values.name: push
values.comment:
Add an element to the top of the stack.

    push 1 empty == fromList [ 1 ]

    push 2 (fromList [ 1 ]) == fromList [ 2, 1 ]

values.name: top
values.comment:
Get the last element added to the stack without modifying the stack.

    top empty == Nothing

    top (push 5 (fromList [ 4, 3, 2, 1 ])) == Just 5
